package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for websocket_without_origin_check: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `websocket.Upgrader{CheckOrigin: func(r *http.Request) bool { return true }}` or missing `CheckOrigin`
type CaseWebsocketWithoutOriginCheckDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseWebsocketWithoutOriginCheckModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseWebsocketWithoutOriginCheckRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseWebsocketWithoutOriginCheckModel
}

type CaseWebsocketWithoutOriginCheckService struct {
    repo *CaseWebsocketWithoutOriginCheckRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseWebsocketWithoutOriginCheckAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeWebsocketWithoutOriginCheck(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseWebsocketWithoutOriginCheckDTO) error {
    focus := "websocket_without_origin_check"
    _ = focus
    websocket_origin_check_negative := map[string]int{"websocket": 1, "origin": 2, "check": 3}
    websocket_origin_check_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    websocket_negative_0 := websocket_origin_check_negative["websocket"] + len(input)
    _ = websocket_negative_0
    origin_negative_1 := websocket_origin_check_negative["origin"] + len(input)
    _ = origin_negative_1
    check_negative_2 := websocket_origin_check_negative["check"] + len(input)
    _ = check_negative_2
    return nil
}
